prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger (6.2L HEMI SRT engine code: ESF) with a 3.5" pulley, ported lower intake manifold, and a Kenne Bell Boost-a-Pump to support 15 psi of boost, pushing power to 950+ WHP on E85 fuel with a supporting fuel system including dual DW450c in-tank fuel pumps and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Getrag TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap (from the Challenger Hellcat Redeye) paired with a Spec Stage 5+ twin-disc clutch, a BTR Stage 3 camshaft (236/242 duration, .624/.624 lift), and a Dynatech 1-7/8" long-tube header system with 3" merge collectors and a custom X-pipe for optimized scavenging

Suspension overhaul with a KW Clubsport 3-way coilover kit (24-way rebound, 16-way compression, adjustable top mounts) paired with Hotchkis Sport Suspension geometry correction kit (specific to Charger SRT), BMR Fabrication adjustable rear subframe connectors, and a Whiteline front sway bar (27mm adjustable) to eliminate body roll and improve turn-in response for high-speed cornering
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny V3 Charger kit (Pandem Design) with custom carbon fiber fenders (2.5" wider front, 3.5" wider rear), extended rocker panels, and a functional carbon fiber hood with dual ram-air scoops and heat extractors, all finished in a custom matte Hyper Black with gloss black accents

Full aero package including a custom APR Performance GT500-style carbon fiber rear wing (adjustable angle, 65" span) mounted on a custom aluminum pedestal, a Seibon carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards, and a custom 3D-printed underbody diffuser with vortex generators for improved downforce and reduced drag (Cd reduction to ~0.32)

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats (reclinable, side bolster adjustment), a custom roll cage (chromoly, 6-point, bolt-in) from Autopower Industries with integrated harness bar, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay with a 12.3" digital gauge cluster (AEM CD-7) and a custom Momo Prototipo steering wheel (flat-bottom, Alcantara, quick-release hub)
